pi_items.source: task.json description and README explicitly specify this channel name requirement
task.json description, README, and setup_task.sh all specify this directory path
task.json description, README, and setup_task.sh all specify this archive directory path
task.json metadata, README schema reference, and setup_task.sh all confirm this table name

O*NET official occupational database (onetonline.org) shows SOC 15-1211.01 is officially titled 'Health Informatics Specialists', not 'Healthcare IT Integration Specialist'. The task README acknowledges both titles, but the official O*NET title differs.
O*NET SOC database verifies 15-1211.01 is correct, but this code maps to 'Health Informatics Specialists' (not 'Healthcare IT Integration Specialist' as claimed in metadata)
Direct inspection of /workspace/assets/hl7-v2.5-batch-adt.hl7 shows encoding field contains '2.5' in BHS and MSH segments
Direct inspection of sample HL7 batch file: BTS segment shows '4'; file contains 4 MSH segments (4 individual messages wrapped in BHS/BTS envelope)
Direct inspection of HL7 batch file shows all messages originate from CityGeneralHospital facility
Direct inspection of PID segments in sample file shows 4 patient MRNs in sequence
Direct inspection of MSH-9 fields in sample file shows these message types across the 4 messages
Environment setup scripts and task utilities reference mirthdb as the NextGen Connect database
setup_nextgen_connect.sh contains DATABASE_URL environment variable with this JDBC URL

HL7 batch file is created by setup script (cp /workspace/assets/hl7-v2.5-batch-adt.hl7), not from real healthcare source. Directories are created by setup_task.sh. Sample patient names and MRNs are test data.

privileged_info_summary: The HL7 batch file processor task uses synthetic test data: an HL7 v2.5 batch file containing 4 ADT messages (A01, A01, A08, A03) from CityGeneralHospital with patient MRNs MRN100001 through MRN100004. The task targets PostgreSQL database 'mirthdb' with table 'batch_processing_log'. Metadata incorrectly identifies the occupation as 'Healthcare IT Integration Specialist' when the official O*NET title for SOC code 15-1211.01 is 'Health Informatics Specialists'. Required directories are /home/ga/hl7_batch_inbox (inbox) and /home/ga/hl7_batch_archive (archive).
